name: Linguine with Spring Vegetables

fresh basil, chopped, or 3 tsp. dried basil
Salt and black pepper to taste

Add heavy cream and chicken stock; cook until liquid is reduced. Add green onions, broccoli, and basil. Season
Cook pasta according to package directions. Add vegetables to pasta and toss with cheese to coat. Garnish with
This is a very easy and delicious pasta dish that is made with ribbons of fettuccine noodles, fresh peas, asparagus,
and cherry tomatoes. It's quick to make and all the ingredients can be purchased at your local grocery store. It's a
